details.productUrlName: Now You See Me Galaxy Foil

customAttributes.description: Exile target creature you control, then return it to the battlefield under its owner's control with X +1/+1 counters on it, where X is the number of mirrors on walls you can see from your seat.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 10/7/2022. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
customAttributes.flavorText: With enough showmanship, even mundane items like playing cards or molecular teleporters can produce a mesmerizing spectacle.
